title: Supply Chain Manager - COSCO India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - COSCO India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the COSCO India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About COSCO India:
COSCO India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with COSCO India!
